summary: Trading terminal price follows chart prints only, fixed packaged app crash, and hardened auto-update system.
release_notes: Trading Terminal current price is now chart-driven only to prevent back-and-forth jumps.
Removed non-TBT market data price updates from TP live price path.
Removed snapshot field-31 TP price seeding; TP still initializes from chart state and keeps T&S prints unchanged.
Alerts now only trigger for tickers visible in your table, respecting the 'Show' row limit and current sort order.
Fixed critical packaged app (BlitzTrade.exe) crash due to missing yfinance dependency bundling.
Made yfinance import optional — app runs without it using urllib fallback for market data.
Added comprehensive startup logging to launcher.py for debugging desktop app issues.
Hardened auto-update system with SHA256 integrity verification and atomic file replacement.
Auto-updates now verify downloaded binary hash before installation, rejecting corrupted files.
Implemented automatic rollback: if update fails, previous version is restored from backup.
Added exponential backoff retry logic for resilient downloads in poor network conditions.
Fixed Windows batch script race conditions with explicit error checking and validation.
Prevents version downgrades via min_version constraint in update manifest.
